enonce.texte:
Read the sentences below and choose the correct technology-related word to complete each sentence.

1. Many people use _______ to stay in touch with friends and family.

2. The internet allows us to connect to various _______ services.

3. Students often use _______ to access information and study online.

4. Good _______ is essential for remote work and online learning.

5. He spends a lot of time on his _______ every day.

questions.texte: Complete each sentence with the correct vocabulary word.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 1 with the word for mobile phones.
sousQuestions.reponse: Many people use smartphones to stay in touch with friends and family.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 2 with the word for connectivity systems.
sousQuestions.reponse: The internet allows us to connect to various network services.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 3 with the word for electronic devices.
sousQuestions.reponse: Students often use computers to access information and study online.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 4 with the word for exchanging information.
sousQuestions.reponse: Good communication is essential for remote work and online learning.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 5 with the word for a mobile phone.
sousQuestions.reponse: He spends a lot of time on his smartphone every day.

enonce.texte:
Read the text below about technology and society and answer the questions.

Technology and Modern Life

Technology has changed almost every aspect of modern life. Communication has become faster and easier. People have been using smartphones to chat with friends, share news, and work remotely for years. Social media platforms allow us to connect with people around the world. However, technology also has its drawbacks. Many people have become too dependent on their devices. They spend less time interacting face-to-face. Some experts believe that this over-reliance on technology can lead to loneliness and mental health problems. In the workplace, automation has replaced many jobs. While technology offers many benefits, it is important to use it wisely.

questions.texte: Answer the following questions based on the text.
questions.reponse:
1. Communication has become faster and easier.
2. Social media platforms allow us to connect with people around the world.
3. Drawbacks include dependence, less face-to-face interaction, loneliness, and mental health problems.
4. Automation has replaced many jobs.
5. Use it wisely.

sousQuestions.texte: How has technology changed communication?
sousQuestions.reponse: Communication has become faster and easier.

sousQuestions.texte: What do social media platforms allow us to do?
sousQuestions.reponse: They allow us to connect with people around the world.

sousQuestions.texte: What are some drawbacks of technology mentioned in the text?
sousQuestions.reponse: Drawbacks include dependence, less face-to-face interaction, loneliness, and mental health problems.

sousQuestions.texte: What has replaced many jobs in the workplace?
sousQuestions.reponse: Automation has replaced many jobs.

sousQuestions.texte: What advice does the text give about using technology?
sousQuestions.reponse: It is important to use technology wisely.

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct form of the present perfect continuous tense.

questions.texte: Fill in the blanks with the correct present perfect continuous form.
questions.reponse:
1. have been using
2. have been studying
3. has been working
4. have been waiting
5. has been sleeping

sousQuestions.texte: People _______ (use) smartphones for communication for years.
sousQuestions.reponse: People have been using smartphones for communication for years.

sousQuestions.texte: She _______ (study) computer science for three years.
sousQuestions.reponse: She has been studying computer science for three years.

sousQuestions.texte: He _______ (work) as a network engineer since 2018.
sousQuestions.reponse: He has been working as a network engineer since 2018.

sousQuestions.texte: They _______ (wait) for the internet to come back for hours.
sousQuestions.reponse: They have been waiting for the internet to come back for hours.

sousQuestions.texte: My brother _______ (sleep) since he got back from work.
sousQuestions.reponse: My brother has been sleeping since he got back from work.

enonce.texte: Choose the correct tense: present perfect simple or present perfect continuous.

questions.texte: Select the correct option for each sentence.
questions.reponse:
1. has been using
2. has used
3. have been working
4. have known
5. has been looking

sousQuestions.texte: She _______ (use) her smartphone all morning. She needs a break!
sousQuestions.reponse: has been using

sousQuestions.texte: He _______ (use) this app for years. It's his favorite.
sousQuestions.reponse: has used

sousQuestions.texte: They _______ (work) on this project since January. It's almost finished.
sousQuestions.reponse: have been working

sousQuestions.texte: I _______ (know) her for ten years.
sousQuestions.reponse: have known

sousQuestions.texte: He _______ (look) for a new smartphone all week.
sousQuestions.reponse: has been looking

enonce.texte: Read the statements about technology. Write whether you agree or disagree and explain why.

questions.texte: Give your opinion on each statement.
questions.reponse: Accept any logical answer expressing agreement or disagreement with supporting reasons.

sousQuestions.texte: Technology has improved communication between people.
sousQuestions.reponse: I agree because we can now communicate instantly with anyone in the world.

sousQuestions.texte: People are too dependent on their smartphones.
sousQuestions.reponse: I agree because many people cannot function without their phones.

sousQuestions.texte: Social media has more negative effects than positive ones.
sousQuestions.reponse: I disagree because social media helps people connect and share important information.

sousQuestions.texte: Technology has created more jobs than it has replaced.
sousQuestions.reponse: I partially agree because while some jobs have been replaced, many new jobs in tech have been created.

sousQuestions.texte: Children should have limited screen time.
sousQuestions.reponse: I agree because too much screen time can affect children's health and development.

enonce.texte:
Write a short essay (150-200 words) discussing how technology has changed the way we communicate. Include both positive and negative aspects.

Instructions:

  • Introduce the topic
  • Discuss positive changes (faster communication, global connections, etc.)
  • Discuss negative changes (less face-to-face interaction, dependence, etc.)
  • Give your opinion on whether the changes are overall positive or negative
  • Use the present perfect continuous at least twice

questions.texte: Write a complete essay on how technology has changed communication.
questions.reponse: A well-structured essay with introduction, body paragraphs discussing positive and negative aspects, and a conclusion stating the author's opinion.

sousQuestions.texte: Introduce the topic of technology and communication.
sousQuestions.reponse: Technology has dramatically changed how we communicate with each other in recent years.

sousQuestions.texte: Discuss positive changes.
sousQuestions.reponse: People have been using smartphones to stay connected instantly, regardless of distance.

sousQuestions.texte: Discuss negative changes.
sousQuestions.reponse: However, many have been spending less time interacting face-to-face.

sousQuestions.texte: Give your opinion with reasons.
sousQuestions.reponse: Although technology has its drawbacks, I believe it has improved communication overall.

sousQuestions.texte: Use the present perfect continuous at least twice.
sousQuestions.reponse: People have been using messaging apps for years. They have been connecting with others globally.
